chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَا أَخَذَهُ اللَّهُ عَلَى الْمُؤْمِنِ مِنَ الصَّبْرِ عَلَى مَا يَلْحَقُهُ فِيمَا ابْتُلِيَ بِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 105 – What (Covenant) Allah<sup>azwj</sup> has Taken upon the Momin, from the patience upon whatever he faces regarding what he has been afflicted with

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/320)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/320)
text: مَا كَانَ فِيمَا مَضَى وَ لَا فِيمَا بَقِيَ وَ لَا فِيمَا أَنْتُمْ فِيهِ مُؤْمِنٌ إِلَّا وَ لَهُ جَارٌ يُؤْذِيهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Abu Ayoub, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘It has not been in the past, nor in what remains (of the future), nor in (the time) what you are in, any Momin except that there is a neighbour for him troubling him’.
en.sarwar: 12. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Ali ibn al-Hakam from abu Ayyub from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “In the past, in future and in your time there has never been a believer, whom a neighbor did not make suffer.”
